since_last: 18% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads -0.69%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 18% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.48% · BTC -0.84% · Gold -1.34% · Nasdaq100 -1.45%. 18% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at -0.69%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.69%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.43%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at -8.22%
cards.body: Leaders: ISRG +3.76%, BIDU +3.58%, AVAV +2.32%, SO +1.47%, INTU +1.44%. Laggards: CEVA -8.22%, SKHY -7.78%, SMR -6.52%, ARM -6.50%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.54% at $136.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.54% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
